assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-24 contain '## Repository Registry' with table headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' and separator '|---|---|---|---|' but no data rows follow.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 26-29 contain '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 31-33 contain '## Code Intelligence' followed by 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' and a Limitations subsection stating 'No limitations known — no Serena instances configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 19-22: 'Searched for Serena tool patterns (find_symbol, get_symbols_overview, search_for_pattern, replace_symbol_body)' and 'No Serena instances discovered'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 31-38: 'Searched for Atlassian MCP tools (prefix `mcp__atlassian__`)' / 'No Atlassian MCP tools found' / 'MCP auto-discovery not available' and lines 36-38: 'No Atlassian MCP available, no REST API fallback attempted' / 'User chose: Manual entry (option 2)'.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 23: 'User prompted: "No Serena MCP servers were found. Would you like to continue without code intelligence or set up Serena first?"' and line 24: 'User chose: Continue without code intelligence'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 39-42: '## Bug Configuration' with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: [docs/bug-template.md](docs/bug-template.md)', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'. All three fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 99-103 show the opt-in prompt: 'User prompted: "Would you like to enable security triage for this project?"' / 'User declined' / 'Result: Security Configuration skipped'. claude-md-result.md was searched end-to-end (44 lines) and contains no '## Security Configuration' section.
